patches.summary: Fix Rappi review findings around opening-hour windows, store adjacency geo, brand cuisine output, diff baselines and inputs, shared request throttling, path slug validation, and ListIDs SQL table selection.
patches.reason: The published Rappi CLI needed narrow post-print fixes for Greptile PR feedback before merge.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./...; go vet ./...; go build ./...; verify_skill.py

patches.summary: Added a typed local store and Cobra address commands for saved delivery addresses.
patches.reason: Rappi usage needs a reusable delivery location with nullable coordinates and an active pointer, which generated profiles cannot model safely.
patches.validated_outcome: Covered by address store and command tests plus isolated-HOME smoke flows.

patches.summary: Applied the active address as default city/lat/lng context in PersistentPreRunE.
patches.reason: Flagless geo commands should answer for the active delivery address while explicit flags and profiles keep precedence.
patches.validated_outcome: Decision-matrix tests cover no-op, explicit skip, profile skip, city-only, coords, corrupt store, dangling active, dry-run, and diff attribution.

patches.summary: Registered the local address command group in the root Cobra tree.
patches.reason: The command group is hand-written and MCP-hidden, so it needs one root registration line outside the generator output.
patches.validated_outcome: CLI tests execute address save/show/use/current/list/delete through the root command.

patches.summary: Added address use to the curated which index.
patches.reason: Generated which entries are static; agents need natural-language discovery for changing delivery location.
patches.validated_outcome: Smoke verification checks which "change my delivery address" returns the address entry.

patches.summary: Documented the address feature and added it to novel_features.
patches.reason: Printing Press skill and README surfaces must stay in lockstep with actual Cobra commands and behavior changes.
patches.validated_outcome: Full verification includes go test, go vet, build, and command smoke flows.

patches.summary: Surfaced available_addresses and active_address in the agent-context introspection JSON.
patches.reason: Agents priming on agent-context must know an active address exists; otherwise they pass explicit --city flags and silently defeat the overlay.
patches.validated_outcome: Covered by TestBuildAgentContext_IncludesAddresses and agent-context smoke output.

patches.summary: Cataloged the 2026-06-01 hand patches from commit 9fd78b2 for search and agent-output behavior.
patches.reason: These local fixes predate this manifest and would be easy to lose on reprint unless indexed here.

deferred_to_upstream.summary: Generalize an active named location/context mechanism for geo-keyed pp CLIs
deferred_to_upstream.reason: Feature is generator-shaped; belongs in the printing-press machine
